changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TYPE OrganizationType as ENUM ('Organization', 'Vendor', 'Subsidiary'); CREATE TABLE organizations ( id serial, name character varying (127) NOT NULL, description text DEFAULT NULL, tax_id character varying (32) DEFAULT NULL, vat_id character varying (32) DEFAULT NULL, org_type OrganizationType DEFAULT 'Organization', street_address_1 character varying (255) DEFAULT NULL, street_address_2 character varying (255) DEFAULT NULL, country_id integer DEFAULT NULL, state_id integer DEFAULT NULL, city_id integer DEFAULT NULL, zip character varying (16) DEFAULT NULL, phone character varying (20) DEFAULT NULL, site character varying (255) DEFAULT NULL, currency_id integer DEFAULT NULL, language_id integer DEFAULT NULL, notes text DEFAULT NULL, status_id integer DEFAULT NULL, average_revenue float(53) DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_organizations PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_countries FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES countries (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_states FOREIGN KEY (state_id) REFERENCES states (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_city FOREIGN KEY (city_id) REFERENCES cities (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_currency FOREIGN KEY (currency_id) REFERENCES currencies (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_language FOREIGN KEY (language_id) REFERENCES languages (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_to_status FOREIGN KEY (status_id) REFERENCES status (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_organization_name ON organizations (name); CREATE INDEX i_organization_country ON organizations (country_id); CREATE INDEX i_organization_state ON organizations (state_id); CREATE INDEX i_organization_city ON organizations (city_id); CREATE INDEX i_organization_currency ON organizations (currency_id); CREATE INDEX i_organization_language ON organizations (language_id); CREATE INDEX i_organization_status ON organizations (status_id);
